_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.

_contextSnippet: in female mouse brains, there were no differences in the surveillance of WT and Nf1± microglia processes...neither in the initial rates of surveillance...nor in the cumulative areas surveyed after 40 min
details: Female WT and Nf1± microglia showed no differences in surveillance parameters (initial rates, cumulative areas, surveillance indexes)
